known_limitations: First-run latency ~1255ms (dominated by mock LLM provider; real Ollama would add ~2-3s)
CV of latency across runs ~4-9% (acceptable for prototype; expected to tighten in production)
ETDStore is in-memory only (no persistence across restarts; ETD cache resets on process exit)
CostTracker aggregates over entire EventStore (no per-session filtering; all tasks in one view)
Sandbox directory is temporary (no persistent workspace storage between sessions)
Model warming up via fire-and-forget task (may not complete before first user task; no effect without Ollama)
ETD avg_cost and avg_latency_ms populated from first execution only (no weighted averaging on subsequent uses)
4-tier CAR (Capability-Aware Routing) is prototype-grade with mock providers
Cost Dashboard (spec 07) is spec-only — no implementation exists
Maximum tested concurrency: 200 tasks (beyond that may encounter SQLite lock contention)

phase_d_tasks.t1_etd_baseline: PASS — 96.77% reduction exceeds 40% target, statistically significant (p<0.000001)

phase_d_tasks.t3_first_run_latency: PASS — initialize() idempotent, redundant warm_up eliminated, ~9% first-pass improvement
